title: Dynamic columns (connected data or manual entry)
excerpt:

posts.author: MikeHarris1 (Mike Harris)
posts.cookedHtml:
When creating boards, I often find I have a mix of items - some items that connect to other boards, some items that are standalone.

I’d like dynamic columns that allow for a mix of both connected mirror data OR manual entry data.

For example:

If an item connects to another board, you can create a mirror item that pulls through the status.
However, if I have an item on the same board that doesn’t connect to anything, I need another column if I want to track its status.

My preferred solution would be a mirror column that also has an option to add manual data if there is no connection.

This would allow me to show the status from other boards on some items, but then manually input and manage the status of items that aren’t connected.

posts.author: dbrown9151 (Danielle Brown)
posts.cookedHtml: This is exactly what I’m looking for, as well! Watching this topic. Hopefully someone can help.
